title: cytisus lusitanicus
intro: Cytisus lusitanicus, also known as Spanish broom, is a perennial leguminous shrub native to the Iberian Peninsula. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Cytisus lusitanicus include reducing symptoms of menopause, improving heart health, and acting as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. Cytisus lusitanicus can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat digestive issues and skin problems.
